properties.name: Feature: Steadfast5e - Proficiency Bonus Cap +4
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Part of the Steadfast5e suite. Slower proficiency bonus progression: +2 (levels 1-6), +3 (7-12), +4 (13+). Designed for gritty, low-fantasy, OSR-style 5E play. Compatible with the D&D 5E 2014 (Legacy) and 2024 versions.
